hunt_objective: Identify living-off-the-land binary (LOLBin) abuse and encoded PowerShell execution on critical endpoints
hunt_hypothesis: An attacker has gained initial access and is using LOLBins to download and execute second-stage payloads while evading EDR detections
known_benign_patterns: SCCM client uses PowerShell encoded commands for policy deployment
IT uses certutil for internal CA certificate distribution
prior_related_incidents: INC-2024-1105: EDR alert for Cobalt Strike beacon signature (unconfirmed, resolved as FP)
analyst_notes: Previous EDR alert may have been a true positive that was prematurely closed. Re-hunting with expanded scope.
constraints: Do not interfere with OT/SCADA systems
